title: Geonomia
description: Geonomia is a web application for exploring and analyzing biodiversity occurrence data, with a focus on collecting events and collectors. It provides tools for clustering occurrences, reconciling collector names, and visualizing data on maps.

specimen_locator.sql: SELECT json_object("href", "https://gbif.org/occurrence/" || gbifid, "label", gbifid) AS link, gbifid, scientificName, eventDate, locality, recordedby, recordnumber FROM occ WHERE recordedby_first_familyname = :Collector_Surname AND recordnumber_mainnumber = :Record_Number AND year = :Year

Record_Number.description: The record number of the specimen

specimen_locator.description: Query to locate a specimen based on collector surname, record number, and year.
specimen_locator.title: Specimen Locator

who_was_there.sql: SELECT json_object("href", "/geonomia/cluster/" || cluster_stage1_id, "label", cluster_stage1_id) AS link, cluster_stage1_id, recordedby_first_familyname, year_min, year_max FROM cluster WHERE :Year BETWEEN year_min AND year_max
who_was_there.description: Query to indicate which collectors were present during a specific time period.
who_was_there.title: Who Was There?

reconcile_rb_rn_yr.description: Open Refine compatible reconciliation backend for collecting event (collector family name, year, record number)
